Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IDialogHost

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Abstraction for the dialog window host (platform window management). Kept host-framework-neutral to enable unit testing with mocks.

public interface IDialogHost

Properties

CanUserResize

Whether user can resize the window.

bool CanUserResize { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Title

Window title.

string? Title { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Methods

Close()

Closes the host window.

void Close()

Move(int, int)

Moves the host window.

bool Move(int x, int y)

Parameters

x int
y int

Returns

bool

Resize(int, int)

Resizes the host window.

bool Resize(int width, int height)

Parameters

width int
height int

Returns

bool

Show()

Shows the host window.

void Show()

ShowWithOwner(INativeHandle)

Shows the host window with an owner handle.

bool ShowWithOwner(INativeHandle owner)

Parameters

owner INativeHandle

Returns

bool

Events

HostClosing

Raised when host window is closing.

event EventHandler? HostClosing

Event Type

EventHandler
